page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion: Iron Maiden 4-Koma KINGS
text:
is a manga anthology series based on the Neon Genesis Evangelion: Iron Maiden video game. It is compiled into a single volume and was published by Ichijinsha in December 1998. https://mediaarts-db.bunka.go.jp/id/M362041 

Editions

ISBN-10: ISBN 4921066019
ISBN-13: ISBN 978-4921066017
